item.title: Did Some Community Cleanup Today
item.description:
Found this LOVELY flyer on the street light on my block this morning while shoveling snow. Such a helpful PSA about family friendly events. But I noticed it was missing something...
So I helpfully got my hammer and fixed the flyer (there were two, which is why the backgrounds are different). I tried to just take it down, but the poster had glued down the entire backside, so hammer it was. And they best believe I'll be checking again every morning. Hate like this has no place in my neighborhood.
item.dc:creator: TyrTheTired

item.title: Semantic bleaching
item.description: In semantics and historical linguistics, semantic bleaching is the loss or reduction of meaning in a word as a result of semantic change. Also known as semantic loss, semantic reduction, desemanticisation, and weakening.
item.dc:creator: ArcadesCinza

item.dc:creator: Definitelygoingtohell

item.title: Painted myself as the Riot! Album cover by Paramore - Mcroft07
item.description: I was looking through my music and saw the album cover and just thought, I can probably paint that. So I did ? I know the album artwork is reversed, the reason why I do this is because when I take photos, I tend to photograph better on the right side, so I accommodate for that and switch things round so they look more "correct" in final photos, that's all :) . Faq: It took about 15 minutes to take off in the shower It took about 3-4 hours to do but I was faffing around so likely less if you're more focused I'm Mcroft07 on all socials I shave half my eyebrows off because it makes it easier when I do paints to change the tail ends to suit the cosplays since I do this so often I did not pretend to paint it and have someone else paint it. I paint them live on twitch if you're so boring you need evidence to prove that theory I did not paint my eyeballs, I'm wearing contact lenses The person at the end is the same person throughout the video, I did not change the person (??) Yes I also think these faq sections are out of hand Yes these are real things I have been consistently asked
item.dc:creator: MCroft07
